'''pamumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiccuping|hiccuping]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-m-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiccuping|hiccuping]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pamumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæmimith|pæmimith]] || [[word:pæmimij|pæmimij]] || [[word:pæmimish|pæmimish]] || [[word:pæmimi|pæmimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pamumumuth|pamumumuth]] || [[word:pamumumuj|pamumumuj]] || [[word:pamumumush|pamumumush]] || [[word:pamumumu|pamumumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pamumuth|pamumuth]] || [[word:pamumuj|pamumuj]] || [[word:pamumush|pamumush]] || [[word:pamumu|pamumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pamufmuth|pamufmuth]] || [[word:pamufmuj|pamufmuj]] || [[word:pamufmush|pamufmush]] || [[word:pamufmuf|pamufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pamumuthu|pamumuthu]] || [[word:pamumuju|pamumuju]] || [[word:pamumushu|pamumushu]] || [[word:pamumuku|pamumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pamumuth|pamumuth]] || [[word:pamumuj|pamumuj]] || [[word:pamumush|pamumush]] || [[word:pamumu|pamumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pamumuthul|pamumuthul]] || [[word:pamumujul|pamumujul]] || [[word:pamumushul|pamumushul]] || [[word:pamumukul|pamumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pamumuthuthu|pamumuthuthu]] || [[word:pamumujuju|pamumujuju]] || [[word:pamumushushu|pamumushushu]] || [[word:pamumuku|pamumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pamumuthun|pamumuthun]] || [[word:pamumujun|pamumujun]] || [[word:pamumushun|pamumushun]] || [[word:pamumukun|pamumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pamumuthuoro|pamumuthuoro]] || [[word:pamumujuoro|pamumujuoro]] || [[word:pamumushuoro|pamumushuoro]] || [[word:pamumukuoro|pamumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
